title: You're going to love these new Christmas printables
description: I’m sending along a little extra email this week because there’s just so much goodness I didn’t want you to miss. We’ve gathered some truly special printables available only to our newsletter community — thoughtful, charming details that make Advent calendars feel extra magical this time of year.Take a peek below, especially if you’re in the midst of prepping for December. These small touches have a way of turning simple moments into memories. And stay tuned — there’s even more coming your way this week. I can’t wait to share what’s next.
author: Cotton Lane

title: Family Recipe Cards
description: Scroll down to check out our latest printable: heartwarming editable cards to capture your family recipes. Why are you receiving this email? You’re here because you either signed up on our website, connected with us through Instagram, or a friend thought you’d love what we share and signed you up. While you’re here — why not stay a while? ✨ Content creators — be sure to scroll to the bottom.
